category_sources: Official CFEngine docs describe managing and automating infrastructure: https://docs.cfengine.com/
source_facts.description says CFEngine helps manage and understand IT infrastructure.
display_name_sources: Official website and documentation brand the product as CFEngine: https://cfengine.com/ and https://docs.cfengine.com/
docs_sources: Official dedicated documentation domain provides CFEngine reference, getting started, tutorials, and release notes: https://docs.cfengine.com/
repo_sources: Official CFEngine source download page points users seeking latest development to the CFEngine GitHub page: https://cfengine.com/downloads/cfengine-community-source/
Official GitHub repository cfengine/core describes CFEngine Community core source: https://github.com/cfengine/core
tags_sources: Official docs cover CFEngine policy language, components, automation, and infrastructure management: https://docs.cfengine.com/
source_facts.executables lists CFEngine agent/server/promise command-line tools.
